label: About
title: About The Magenta Quiet Gate
short_blurb: Built from saved signals, source research, one generated plate, and a corrected post-plate mapping pass.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

A follow-up vision pass re-read the finished plate, moved the clickable regions onto Rose Field Gate, Blue Dress Inlay, Sound Leaves Pinholes, October Glass Slit, and Sea Salt Seam, and then the mask audit tested tighter geometry from those corrected regions. Run artifacts are in tmp/daily-process-runs/magenta-tight-remap-2026-04-27/remap-2026-04-26-magenta-quiet-gate-v1.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
